title: ampacus celastracea
intro: Ampacus celastracea is a plant species commonly known as the Coral-root or Coral-root orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ampacus celastracea are attributed to its ability to support immune function, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Ampacus celastracea can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
